verbatim_text: And I'm like, OK, you know what? What's your deal? His deal was basically, do you remember this? Like, his plan was he took eight classes at the same time. Some of them actually literally at the same time. I don't know how he did this. Besides, he had like some ring from Hermione Gratia or something. And his plan was to graduate in two years. And he only had A's and A-classes. And I told you, this is the dumbest thing I've ever heard. That's what you said, yeah. Why did you only take four classes and spend the rest of your time in my lab? I give you a desk in my lab. And the rest is history.
